front: Novel: Sergeant Cuff investigates the theft of a diamond from Rachel Verinder; Godfrey Ablewhite is revealed as the thief
Novel: Franklin Blake unknowingly took a diamond while under the influence of laudanum and reenacts the events
Novel: the title diamond was originally stolen during the Siege of Seringapatam; three Brahmin 'jugglers' seek to recover it
Novel: Sergeant Cuff is obsessed with growing roses and employs a bulging-eyed boy nicknamed 'Gooseberry'
Novel: art teacher Walter Hartright discovers Laura Fairlie resembles asylum escapee Anne Catherick
Novel: Marian catches cold climbing a roof in rain to overhear a plot against Laura; the obese Count Fosco is the villain
Author: had a laudanum addiction and believed he was accompanied by a doppelganger 'ghost'
Author: co-wrote The Frozen Deep and 'A House to Let' with Charles Dickens
